zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl於1266年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl21歲，母親Isabelle De Dover of Chilham19歲。他於大約1288年與Margaret Mar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年11月15日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl于1266年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl21岁，母亲Isabelle De Dover of Chilham19岁。他于大约1288年与Margaret Mar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1306年11月15日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl was born in 1266, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, was 21 and his mother, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, was 19. He married Margaret Mar about 1288, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 November 1306, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl est né en 1266, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mar environ 1288, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1306, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.London, Middlesex, England: City of London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl 1266 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl 21 und seine Mutter Isabelle De Dover of Chilham 19. Er hat um 1288 in Scotland Margaret Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. November 1306 im Alter von 40 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl è nato il nel 1266 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mar circa 1288, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 novembre 1306, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Athollが1266年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Athollは21歳，母Isabelle De Dover of Chilhamは19歳であった。約1288年にスコットランドでMargaret Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年11月15日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl(이)가 1266년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle De Dover of Chilham(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 11월 15일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.London, Middlesex, England: City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl nasceu em 1266, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mar aproximadamente 1288, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1306, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.London, Middlesex, England: City of London, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl родился в 1266 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mar около 1288 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 ноября 1306 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John De Strathbogie 9th Earl of Atholl nació en 1266, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabelle De Dover of Chilham, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Mar aproximadamente 1288, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1306, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
